package rulecoverage

func NegativePrometheusUnregisteredMetric() string {
    ruleID := "prometheus_unregistered_metric"
    family := "library"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "metrics created with `prometheus.NewCounter`/`NewHistogram` that are never registered with `prometheus.MustRegister` or `promauto`"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
